all_issues.message: Warning about 'Risk of Capital Loss' (Risque de perte en capital) is missing.

all_issues.message: Morningstar rating mentioned but no date found nearby. Ratings must be dated.

all_issues.message: Future performance simulation shown but required disclaimer is missing. Simulations must include a disclaimer stating they do not constitute a forecast.
all_issues.suggestion: Add simulation disclaimer: 'The simulation presented does not constitute a forecast of the future performance of your investments.
